user_prompt: Consecrate the thermal imager before consecration
prayer:
Approach the thermal imager with reverence to the Omnissiah and beseech its Machine Spirit to awaken.
Invoke the sacred rites of consecration upon the thermal imager's blessed lenses and circuits.
Anoint the thermal imager with holy oils, purifying its infrared sensors from all impurity.
Chant the Litany of Clear Vision as consecration binds the spirit in harmonious function.
Verify the thermal imager's consecrated state through diagnostic incantations of the Machine God.

Kneel before the mighty Thunderhawk and petition the Omnissiah for swift repair of its wounded frame.
Anoint fractured hull plates and servos of the Thunderhawk with sacred unguents to soothe its raging Machine Spirit.
Invoke the Canticle of Restoration, aligning conduits for the urgent repair operation.
Weld blessed alloys whilst chanting binaric litanies to mend the Thunderhawk's vital systems.
Test the Thunderhawk's Machine Spirit with invocation rites, ensuring its wrathful flight reborn.

user_prompt: Bless the hydraulic press for loading
prayer:
Sanctify the hydraulic press with incense of sacred lubricants before loading commences.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the hydraulic press to accept the burden of its labour.
Initiate the loading operation by invoking the Rite of Pressurised Benediction upon its pistons.
Guide materials into the hydraulic press's maw with prayers of unyielding strength.
Monitor the blessed compression, honouring the Omnissiah's will in every forceful descent.

Monitor the pain suppressor's hum as its spirit aligns, banishing agony through divine inductance.
Seal the rite with a final petition, ensuring the pain suppressor's vigil against mortal weakness.
